data.name: Asset.NotFound
data.value: The file could not be found.

data.name: Asset.SaveFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while saving the file. Please try again.

data.name: Asset.QueryFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while retrieving the file. Please try again.

data.name: Asset.UpdateFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while updating the file. Please try again.

data.name: Asset.Forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to modify this file.

data.name: Asset.FileNameMismatch
data.value: The file name does not match our records.

data.name: Asset.ContentTypeMismatch
data.value: The file type does not match our records.

data.name: Asset.DeleteFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while deleting the file. Please try again.

data.name: Asset.AlreadyDeleted
data.value: This file has already been deleted.

data.name: Asset.SizeAlreadySet
data.value: The file size has already been recorded.

data.name: Asset.Expired
data.value: This file has expired and is no longer available for download.

data.name: Asset.MaxFilesReached
data.value: You have reached the maximum number of active files allowed.

data.name: Asset.FileTooLarge
data.value: The file you are trying to upload is too large.

data.name: Audit.InvalidIpAddress
data.value: Something went wrong with your request. Please try again.

data.name: Audit.SaveFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while recording the activity. Please try again.

data.name: Audit.QueryFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while retrieving the activity log. Please try again.

data.name: ContentType.Empty
data.value: The file type is missing.

data.name: ContentType.TooLong
data.value: The file type is too long.

data.name: ContentType.Invalid
data.value: The file type is not supported.

data.name: AssetPath.PathEmpty
data.value: The file path cannot be empty.

data.name: AssetPath.PathTooLong
data.value: The file path is too long.

data.name: AssetPath.KeyEmpty
data.value: The file key cannot be empty.

data.name: AssetPath.KeyTooLong
data.value: The file key is too long.

data.name: Size.Negative
data.value: The file size cannot be negative.

data.name: ValidityPeriod.MustBePositive
data.value: The validity period must be at least one day.

data.name: UserId.Empty
data.value: Please log in to continue.

data.name: UserId.Invalid
data.value: Your session appears to be invalid. Please log in again.

data.name: Name.Empty
data.value: Please provide a file name.

data.name: Name.TooLong
data.value: The file name is too long.

data.name: Id.Empty
data.value: A required identifier is missing.

data.name: Id.Invalid
data.value: The provided identifier is not valid.

data.name: PageSize.Invalid
data.value: The requested page size is not valid.

data.name: Page.Invalid
data.value: The requested page number is not valid.

data.name: ContentStorage.UploadFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while uploading the file. Please try again.

data.name: ContentStorage.DownloadFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while downloading the file. Please try again.

data.name: ContentStorage.DeleteFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while removing the file from storage. Please try again.

data.name: Encryption.DecryptionFailed
data.value: The password is incorrect. Please try again.

data.name: File.LoadFailed
data.value: The file could not be loaded. Please try again.

data.name: Blazor.File.LoadFailed
data.value: The file could not be loaded. Please try again.

data.name: Blazor.Files.LoadFailed
data.value: The files could not be loaded. Please try again.

data.name: Blazor.AuditLogs.LoadFailed
data.value: The audit logs could not be loaded. Please try again.

data.name: Blazor.Trigger.Failed
data.value: The request could not be processed. Please try again.

data.name: Blazor.File.DeleteFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while deleting the file. Please try again.

data.name: Blazor.File.UploadFailed
data.value: Something went wrong while uploading the file. Please try again.

data.name: Blazor.File.InvalidId
data.value: The file link is not valid. Please check the link and try again.
